ReportDefinitionEN: Domestic energy suppliers in Italy provide gas and electricity to residential customers, operating in a liberalised market regulated by ARERA.
MarketingDefinitionEN: Italian domestic energy suppliers serve residential and small business customers with electricity and gas contracts.
KeywordsIncludeEN: energy supplier, electricity provider, gas supplier, utility, energy retail
KeywordsIncludeIT: fornitore energia, fornitore elettricità, fornitore gas
